summary: Frontend-only iteration 2 testing complete for MULTIPLIKATOR site. All 8 requested checks pass green. Verified: (1) Footer 5 social testids point to real URLs (facebook/instagram/youtube/tiktok/linkedin) with exact href matches; (2) Social page /reseaux renders all 7 platforms with correct social-{Name} testids and URLs (Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn, Telegram, WhatsApp); (3) New /notre-histoire page loads with title 'De Godomey vers le monde — l'aventure MULTIPLIKATOR.', mentions Multiplikator/allemand, displays all 6 timeline years 2021-2026, all 4 values (Excellence, Communauté, Ouverture, Transmission), and CTA 'Faites partie de la suite.' (verified in source — rendered uppercase via CSS); (4) New /appel-a-investissement page loads with title, 4 key stats (370 M, +340%, 90%+, 4-6 ans), 4 projects (Nouveaux campus, Académie, Plateforme e-learning, Tourism), 3 partnership forms (Equity, Prêt convertible, Mécène), 3 CTA buttons (Demander le dossier, Email direct, WhatsApp); (5) Header L'Institut dropdown has all 6 items including Notre histoire and Appel à investissement with correct hrefs; (6) Campuses page: 5 campuses (godomey/akpakpa/porto-novo/lokossa/djougou) now show map images that load successfully (naturalWidth>0), 6th (parakou) still shows placeholder as expected; (7) Mobile (390x844) hamburger toggle visible and opens menu with all 4 tabs, h1 has 'text-3xl sm:text-5xl' classes; (8) Tablet (768x1024) grids correct: Campuses md:grid-cols-2, Team sm:grid-cols-2/lg:grid-cols-4, TrainingPlus sm:grid-cols-2. 68/70 playwright assertions PASS; the 2 'failures' are false negatives due to inner_text returning CSS-uppercase-transformed text vs original-case search string (content verified present in source via grep). Backend sanity skipped per main agent instruction (no backend changes this iteration).
critical_code_review_comments: Header navGroup item key uses it.to but two items in same group could theoretically share a path (low risk currently). Mobile menu uses same key pattern.
Investment.jsx hardcodes financial figures (370M, +340%, etc.) inline — fine for now, but consider extracting to data.js if numbers change frequently.
History.jsx TIMELINE and Investment.jsx PROJECTS arrays are local consts; if reused elsewhere they should be moved to /lib/data.js for single source of truth.
Campuses.jsx aspect-square map container with object-contain is good for varied image aspect ratios, but may leave whitespace; acceptable trade-off vs cropping.
test_credentials: admin@multiplikator.bj / Multiplikator2026! (not used this iteration, frontend only)
context_for_next_testing_agent: When asserting text content for elements with Tailwind 'uppercase' class, use case-insensitive matching since Playwright inner_text returns CSS-transformed text. Both Investment 'Pourquoi MULTIPLIKATOR ?' h2 and History 'Faites partie de la suite.' h2 are visually uppercase. Map images at customer-assets.emergentagent.com load reliably. New routes /notre-histoire and /appel-a-investissement work via Layout wrapper.
rca of the issue: N/A — no real issues found. Two assertion mismatches in test script were false negatives caused by CSS text-transform:uppercase, content is correct.
